title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, Blackbeard as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm here to discuss something with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The quality isn't very good, is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Before, you were just a puny apprentice

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those 22 years passed by so fast...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even the duel between you and Hawkeye

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is still news to my ears ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: When you came back from East Blue

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.
